name: Financial services (PCI DSS 4.0 / SOX)
description: PCI DSS 4.0 and Sarbanes-Oxley focused report. Includes cardholder-data-flow context and segregation-of-duties gaps for retail banking, payments, or treasury workloads.
narrative_persona: internal auditor at a mid-size payments processor
